title: Fix atom-key args in a welcome-email worker
prompt: The worker in `test_fixtures/atom_keys_worker.ex` uses atom keys both when building args and when pattern-matching on them in perform/1. Oban JSON-serializes args on insert, so all keys are strings at perform-time — the current pattern match will never match and the job will fail with FunctionClauseError on retry. Rewrite the full module to use string keys everywhere (enqueue helper and perform/1). Keep the module name, queue, and alias structure intact. Write the output to `lib/my_app/workers/welcome_email_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single-step transformation of a small, well-known anti-pattern. Sonnet typically one-shots it once given a clear prompt.
research_citation: oliver-kriska/claude-elixir-phoenix Iron Laws — 'atom keys instead of strings in job arguments'
